backend/main.mo: Defines pagination helpers and core parish data types including sacraments, family members, parishioners, localities, and budget transactions, integrating storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence for two PDF formatting updates related to left-aligning letter text and shifting the signature block in generateLetterPDF.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files, detailing their purpose in dialogs, pages, hooks, styles, and the PDF generator.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind setup defining OKLCH‑based light and dark theme variables for global styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry file mounting the root element and loading the main React script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level app component handling authentication, profile setup flow, theming, and layout rendering.
frontend/src/components/BudgetDialog.tsx: Dialog form for creating or editing budget transactions with fields for type, amount, date, category, and description.
frontend/src/components/CollectiveOfferi: Dialog for adding or editing collective locality offerings, including amount, locality, description, and full date selection mapped to nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/components/EventDialog.tsx: A dialog component for creating and editing events with title, date, description, and task management.
frontend/src/components/FunctionAssignme: A form dialog for adding or editing parish function assignments, including title, description, address, and multiple contacts.
frontend/src/components/FunctionLocality: A dialog for managing locality-based function assignments with fields for name, description, parishioners, and contacts.
frontend/src/components/IndividualOfferi: A dialog for creating or editing individual offerings, handling amounts, dates, and timestamps with a calendar picker.
frontend/src/components/LetterDialog.tsx: A dialog for creating or editing letters, supporting title and body editing with PDF formatting notes.
frontend/src/components/LocalityDialog.t: A dialog for adding or updating locality information including contact data and a list of tasks.
frontend/src/components/MainLayout.tsx: Provides the main app layout with sidebar navigation and renders different page sections based on selected menu items.
frontend/src/components/NoteDialog.tsx: Dialog for creating and editing parish notes with fields for title, date, and content.
frontend/src/components/ParishionerDialo: Complex dialog for creating and editing parishioner data, including family, sacraments, and individual offerings.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting new users to enter name and role, then saves their profile.
Dialog for adding or editing statistical entries like attendance and communion counts with date selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, handling login, logout, identity loading, and state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines many React Query hooks for fetching and mutating parish-related data via the actor API, including paginated lists and update operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining global styles and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates branded parish PDF documents using an HTML template with header, quote, content, and auto-print behavior.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Budzet.tsx: Budget management page handling monthly and yearly financial data, CRUD operations, pagination, and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard showing parishioner stats, finances, events, anniversaries, and generating PDF exports.
frontend/src/pages/FunkcjeParafialne.tsx: Manages individual and locality parish function assignments with paginated lists, editing dialogs, and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Kartoteka.tsx: Manages paginated parishioner records with search, CRUD actions, view modes, and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Korespondencja.tsx: Handles listing, searching, creating, editing, deleting, and PDF exporting of correspondence letters.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Provides a login screen using Internet Identity with simple UI layout.
frontend/src/pages/Miejscowosci.tsx: Manages localities and their collective offerings with pagination, CRUD dialogs, and data fetching.
frontend/src/pages/Statystyki.tsx: Displays and edits parish statistics, calculates totals and sacrament counts, and exports PDF reports.
frontend/src/pages/Uwagi.tsx: Handles parish notes with CRUD operations and generates a PDF of sorted notes.
frontend/src/pages/Wydarzenia.tsx: Page component for listing, paginating, editing, deleting, and exporting events to PDF with an event dialog and page size controls.
frontend/src/utils/anniversaries.ts: Utility functions to compute anniversary summaries, generate labels, and format anniversaries for PDF export.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, radius, animations, and registering typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the app, planned features, known issues, and requested work on the Chrzty section and PDF fixes.
